# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.

Write secure code.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://example.com
        - https://another-example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
      credentials: true
    enabled: true
    run_on: first
    protocols:
      - http
      - https

  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
      hide_credentials: true
    enabled: true
    run_on: first
    protocols:
      - http
      - https

  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 100
      hour: 1000
      policy: local
    enabled: true
    run_on: first
    protocols:
      - http
      - https

services:
  - name: example-service
    url: http://example-service.local
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - https://example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
          headers:
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
          credentials: true
        enabled: true

      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey
          hide_credentials: true
        enabled: true

      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 50
          hour: 500
          policy: local
        enabled: true

routes:
  - name: example-route
    paths:
      - /example
    service: example-service
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - https://example.com
          methods:
            - GET
          headers:
            - Authorization
          credentials: true
        enabled: true

      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey
          hide_credentials: true
        enabled: true

      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 20
          hour: 200
          policy: local
        enabled: true
